seo.title: Privacy notice
seo.description: Privacy placeholder for Energy Storage Enclosure. Replace before production.

sections.title: Privacy Notice
sections.description: Structural placeholder. Replace with counsel-reviewed copy.

sections.title: What this notice should cover
sections.description: Describe collection via contact forms and /api/lead, lawful basis, retention, transfers, and data subject rights matching your operator.

items.question: What data is collected?
items.answer: Typical submissions include name, email, optional phone, and message content. Routing metadata may include site slug and form ID.

items.question: Where is Energy Storage Enclosure registered?
items.answer: See company.registeredAddress and legal.dataController in site.config.ts.
